role: Senior Commander, IRGC Aerospace Force (d. 10 March 2026)
bio: Esmail Dehghan served as a senior commander in the [IRGC Aerospace Force](/orgs/irgc-aerospace-force), representing the successor generation to [Amir Ali Hajizadeh](/people/amir-ali-hajizadeh) who was killed in June 2025. He was killed on 10 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave) targeting the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps)'s reconstituted aerospace command.

sources.title: IRGC Aerospace Commander Killed in Strike

editorial_notes: Killed 10 March 2026. Successor-generation IRGC Aerospace Force senior commander after Hajizadeh's death in June 2025.
